label: MA Cue Mapper
info: MA Cue Mapper — FlowFuse Dashboard 2.0. Maintains a per-space mapping of human-friendly cue labels (e.g. "Green Look") to MA target commands (sequence cue or executor cue). Persists to node-red/config/ma-cue-map.json. Fire panel wires directly into the existing MA Control gate.

name: Load ma-cue-map.json
Space selector
label: Space
tooltip: Select the space this cue belongs to

name: Target type
label: Target Type
tooltip: Sequence cue: Go+ Sequence X Cue Y  |  Executor cue: Go+ Executor [zone] Cue Y

name: Sequence number
label: Sequence # (sequence type only)
tooltip: MA sequence ID — used only when target type is Sequence Cue

name: Cue number
label: Cue #
tooltip: MA cue number (applies to both sequence and executor cue types)

name: Store form field
Save entry button
label: Save Entry
tooltip: Save (add or update) the cue entry for the selected space and label

name: Delete entry button
label: Delete Entry
tooltip: Remove the cue entry matching the current space and label

name: Save cue entry

tooltip: Space whose cue label list will be searched

label: Cue Label

label: Fire Cue
